title: Infinity Symbol: Copy & Paste ∞ Infinity Signs & Variants
meta_description: Copy and paste the infinity symbol (∞) and its Unicode variants — proportional, incomplete, negated, and looping signs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The infinity sign (∞) and every Unicode variation of the endless loop — mathematical, decorative, and looping. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The infinity symbol represents the endless and the limitless. This library collects the classic lemniscate, its mathematical variants, and related looping characters often used for tattoos, bios, and eternity motifs.

sections.label: Infinity
sections.intro: The standard infinity sign plus the permanent-paper (eternal) and proportional variants.

sections.label: Math Variants
sections.intro: Infinity characters from the mathematical symbol blocks.

sections.label: Looping
sections.intro: Related curves and loops used for endless or cyclical motifs.
